titleStmt.title: SII 39.252: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 252. (A.R. No. 252 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE GŌPURA OF THE SAME TEMPLE, RIGHT SIDE, VĪRAPRATĀPA DĒVARĀYA MAHĀRĀYA MALLIKĀRJUNARĀYAR-ŚAKA 1385 (1462-63 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a sarvamāṇya gift of the taxes imposed on each Taṟi of by the Kaikōḷas and others artiśans of Suṅgadavirthachōḻanallūr alias Tirumuṭṭam for the supply of food offerings and conducting the service called Rāhuttamiṇḍaṉ śandi instituted in the temple, Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiya-nāyanār at Suṅgamtavirtta-chōlanallūr alias Tirumuṭṭam in Virudarājabhayaṅgaravaḷanaḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran hariya
bhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappum Irāyar kaṇ
ṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭa nāṭu ko
ṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūrvate
paccima Uttara catusamuttirāpati śrī virappitāpa
tavarāya mahārāyar mallikāṟcuṉarāyar prativi
ciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakāpatam 1000 3 100 8 10 5l me
l cellā niṉṟa śitrabhānu samvat sarattu thanunāya
ṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañmiyum cukravāramu nāṭ
śākattu nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāja payaṅkaravaḷa
ṭu melkā nāṭṭu Iruṅkoḷappāṇṭi viḷa
ṉtaik kūṟṟattu cuṅkam tavitta coḻanallūrāṉa tirumuṭṭattu
Uṭaiyār tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Irākutta miṇṭaṉ canti
kkum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum Inta Ūr tirunāmattukkāṇi tirumaṭai
viḷākam Uya kaikkoḷar peril taṟikkum pala paṭṭaṭaik kuṭikaḷ
peṟkum Āyam kāṇikkai cammātam piṟavari viṉiyokam ma
ṟṟum pala Upātiyum Uya caṟuvamāniyam Āka cettapaṭi
Āle Inta mutal koṇṭu Irākutta miṇ
ntiyum Ammutuceya paṇṇuvittu cantirāti
tavaraiyum carvamāniyam Āka Aṉupavittu koḷ
ḷa kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷavumā
Digital edition of SII 39.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
